creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please repocopy:

	ports/comms/mgetty+sendfax/pkg-install

to:

	ports/comms/mgetty+sendfax/files/mgettycfg.in

The configuration script is currently available from pkg_add only,
and I'd like to add it to the port as a standalone command.

This would also avoid prompts when adding lots of packages while
forgetting to set BATCH.
